# OptionsType

**Associated Type**

A type that indicates the options supported by the destination device.

## Declaration

```swift
associatedtype OptionsType : CaseIterable, Hashable, RawRepresentable, Sendable where Self.OptionsType.RawValue == String
```

## Discussion

This type defines the [doc://AppMigrationKit/documentation/AppMigrationKit/MigrationRequestWithOptions/options] of the export’s [doc://AppMigrationKit/documentation/AppMigrationKit/MigrationRequestWithOptions]. If you don’t need a unique type for export options, your app extension can conform to [doc://AppMigrationKit/documentation/AppMigrationKit/ResourcesExporting] instead, which uses [doc://AppMigrationKit/documentation/AppMigrationKit/MigrationDefaultSupportedOptions].
title: OptionsType
